Entry.JapaneseText: この街では今 甘い物ブームが巻き起こっているらしい
Entry.EnglishText: Apparently there's a sweets boom sweeping through this town right now.

Entry.JapaneseText: しかし過度の偏食は 身体に異常をきたす原因にもなるから 気をつけるべきだと思うんだ
Entry.EnglishText: However, having an excessively unbalanced diet can cause your body to have issues down the line, so I think folks should be careful about it.

Entry.JapaneseText: そうか？ そんなのいちいち気にする程の事でも ねぇと思うんだけどな
Entry.EnglishText: Yeah? I don't think people should worry about every little thing to that extent, though.

Entry.JapaneseText: 気になるさ。 健康も含め、みんなの心身を守るのも 騎士団の務めだからね
Entry.EnglishText: I am concerned, though. Protecting the health of one's mind and body is still a task of being a knight.
